transcript: Hi, yes. I got a coupon here. You guys honor coupon up ‘ere?
It’s for, ah—It’s for, ah, two large pizza, one-time delivery.
We usually don’t have coupons for delivery.
And it said y'all took coupons up ‘ere.
We take coupons, but not on deliveries. They’re—
—‘Okay, so if I pick it up you don’t honor the coupon? Beg your pardon? [exhales]
I—I could use a coupon for pickup or carryout.
I’ll send an Uber up ‘ere to pick it up. So I can [sic] get a pineapple?
What do—what does it say on the coupon?
It says, ah, “Remove here. Pineapple”. Yeah, and you take one off and then it says that y’all accept coupon for double pizza.
I—uh, okay, but, I mean, does it have, like, a certain price or something?—
—And then you take one off and it says that y’ll accept coupon. Yeah! It says—ah, let’s see—“four ninety-nine”. Mhm.
Tha—that—that can’t be here; we don’t have a pizza for that.
Oh! [delay] Yeah, it says—ah, let’s see—“four ninety-nine”. I’ll just send an Uber up ‘ere and they can pick it up and, ah, bring it back to the hotel here. Did you have—
Hi! So I’m over by the airport here and, ah, I’m gonna send an Uber over—
We—we don’t have an airport in Warrenton. This is Warrenton, Virginia, sir.
I know. I’m coming in from Arlington.
There’s no airport around here, around our location.
I’m coming there and I’m sending an Uber to bring it to me.
You’re sending an Uber all the way from Arlington to Warrenton?
—I’m in Arling—I’m in Arlington; I’m coming to the airport here.
But we’re like an hour away from you, sir.
So that’s why I’m sending the Uber: so they’ll get there and they’ll bring it to me and then I don’t have to wait around for an hour. So I just wanted to get two pineapple pizzas—
—And we’ll pick that up, here, ah, within the hour. Hm?
[pitch fx] Two—two large, okay? Two large [delay] two large. Two large and then, ah, salad, and then you’re gonna take the coupon—let’s see—so, salads?
[reverb & delay] Wh—what did you have, ah—I would like to get extra croutons, if I could.
We don’t have croutons for our salads here.
Uh-huh, ah, let’s see—artichoke? Artichoke and cucumber and grated cheese and ranch or Thousand Island—
—The only thing we put on our salads is tomato, onion, black olives, and cucumber.
[pitch fx] Black olives. Okay, black olives, cucumbers, any kinda cheese or [delay] mayonnaise—s—s—s—s—s—s—s—s—s—s—s—s—s?
W—w—we don’t put mayonnaise on our salads, sir.
W—we don’t have that option, either.
Okay, cucumber, ranch dressing, please, and green peas, iceberg lettuce.
I don’t have peas here for my salads, either.
[pitch fx] Okay, what did you say—
—on the [delay] croutons—s—s—s—s—s? What did you say on the croutons?—
I couldn’t remember. So, I’ll take two salads, then, on the—and a [delay] breadstick—k—k—k.
Okay, cheesy bread or something like that?
I have a garlic cheese bread.
Yeah, I need the garlic cheese bread with extra cheese—
—You want a six- or a twelve-inch?—
—and with pepperoni. And with pepperoni on it, [pitch & delay] please—please—please—please. Can you put the pepperoni on the cheesy bread?
Alright, do you want a six- or a twelve-inch, sir?
It’s [delay] what—at—at—at—at—at—at—at—at—at—at—at? What did you say?
Will this—will this fit in an Uber?
Will this [pitch-down] “fit” in an Uber? I don’t know what size it is. Can I get a 24-inch cheesy bread—
—I don’t know where you think you’ve called, but it—I—I don’t have--have the stuff you’re asking for.
Okay, you have cheesy bread, you said?
Yeah, it’s on a sub roll, though.
I have to get several? Okay, I could take four of ‘em.
Hi! So I’m just trying to figure out this coupon that I have for your pizzas—if I can get double pizzas and it only says two but I need four pizzas, m’kay?
We don’t have coupons here. You—you’ve called the wrong location. You’re going to have to call somewhere else.

[sfx] But—[stammers] I’ll just forget the coupon, skip the coupon, and I need those four pepperoni pizzas; that’s the last thing I need to add to the order. I’m landing right now in Arlington., [sfx] 'kay? I’m sending an Uber by there in about 25 minutes, [pitch & delay] alright—right—right?
Uber’s not gonna be here in 25 minutes—
What do you mean by that? I already called ‘em!
Stop calling here! C—call somewhere else!
[sfx] Uber is on their way, ma’am!
Yes, I was just trying to get a total for my order; I never got the grand total.
I ordered four pizzas, two salad, and cheesy bread.
[pitch] Four large with pepperoni. And—and pineapp—
Ah, so large—four large pepperoni, pineapple—ah!—bacon—
Okay, Kimpy, pick it eh—Come pick it up!
I’m, ah, getting, ah, s—“four salads now, tonight, and I need [pitch fx] four salads carefully made, okay? I want iceberg lettuce—
—Ah, we don’t have anything like that—
—Even fourths. And I need egg; deviled egg placed in the salad, m’kay?
Hi! Could I get a pickup?
—Can I get a—pick up a pizza?
Yeah, I’ll be there in about 25 minutes, okay? Could I get a cheese pizza and a mushroom pizza? Half-and-half? Can you do half cheese, half mushroom, half pepperoni?
It—it—W—what do you want on your pizza, sir?
Yeah, on the other pizza, ah, just all cheese. [delay] Yeah—yeah.
Okay, so you want one cheese, one half pepperoni and one half mushroom; is that correct?
One cheese pizza, one half pepperoni, one half mushroom—[pitch & delay] Uh-huh—huh—huh!
—there some reason why you’re glitching when you’re speaking to me? You’re glitching when you’re speaking to me.
Well, I’m at a payphone at the airport right here and I’m—
—sound like you’re talking on a computer, sir.
I’m talking on a payphone here. I keep running out of quarters. I’m just tryin’ to place an order for pickup. How long does it take for pickup up, anyhow, up [delay] ‘ere—‘e—‘e—‘e—‘e?
It’s gonna be about 30 minutes, but if you’re in Arlington, you’re an hour away from me; do you understand that?
—it’s gonna cost you more to send an Uber out here and back to Arlington than it is just to get something closer to you.
Oh, I understand! I’ve already paid for the Uber; it’s not an issue. Sally is her name; she’ll be there in 20 minutes. I’m trying to place this order for two pizzas; one is half mushroom—
—She’s not gonna be here in 20 minutes, sir—
—half pepperoni, [pitch & delay] okay—kay—kay—kay? And then two salads!
—Alright. What kinda dressing with your salad?—
—And one large cheese pizza with no [delay] topping—p—p—p—p—p, okay?
What kinda dressing for your salad, sir?
Thousand Island. Thousand [delay] Islan—n—n—n—n—n. What dress—
—And two cheesy breads, please., [pitch-down] with pepperonis on the cheesy breads. Yeah! Yeah—h—h—h—h—h—h—h—h!
This is Skip! S-K-I-P. S-K-I-P. Skip Knox, K-N-O-X—
—‘Cause that doesn’t sound sketchy at all. What’s your phone number, sir?—

—Skip Knox. Skip Knox. Oh, I’m at (425)405-4051; that’s my number at the hotel—tel—tel—tel. So if you could just have that ready, Sally the Uber driver’s gonna be [pitch-up] up ‘ere! Okay? Do you have any drinks? Any fountain drinks or water [pitch-down] or anything?—
—I’m pretty thirsty up ‘ere! I’m thirsty up here. Ha—ha—ha—ha—ha—ha!
You’re talking on a computer. Stop calling here!
Yeah, do you sell bags o’ ice?
Okay, what do you got for desserts?
Okay, ‘cause—Now, I need about 64 cannolis tonight.
We’re not don’ this again today, bud! No—not happenin’!
Well, I’m pickin’ ‘em up; I’m takin’ an Uber up ‘ere to pick ‘em up.
—You didn’t pick up the order you called in the other day! We’re not doin’ this shit, man. Call another place.
I don’t care, man! We don’t have ‘em!
I’ll give you some time to put ‘em together. I’m takin’ a Lyft down there.
Vinnie’s. Can I place an order, please?
Yes, I’m tryin’ to get an order on some cannolis.
Um, wh—wh—what, um, what did you need?
I need about 72 cannolis tonight! It’s for a—
—Okay, well, I’m so sorry that, um, we don’t have 72 cannolis.
Well, it’s for a banquet, for a children’s soccer team tonight.
—and you would have to call prior to just calling right now to get cannolis. Thank you! We would like for you not to call again.
Vinnie’s. Can I take your order, please?
Yes, I think I got cut off!
Okay, you didn’t get cut off! We don’t have any lasagna for you—
—and we would really appreciate if you all—w—w—you would stop calling. You need to call somewhere else—
Hi! Yeah, I need to get some meatballs—uh, meatball pasta.
I don’t—I don’t have that, sir. If you could just stop calling here, I’d appreciate it—
—Can I get an order of meatball, ah, pasta—
Hi! Yeah, could I get pickup? Pizza?
—W—w—we got a banquet for a kids’ soccer team, y’understand?
What do you—w—how many pizza you want?
Oh, I don’t—I don’t have it—I cannot make it, man.
I’m, uh, taking a car—I rented a car to come down there [delay] I’m taking a—I’m, uh, [heavily pitched-down] rented a car to…
[unintelligible] …try another day, okay? H—have a—have a good night—
—How ‘bout—Can you do 10? Can you do 10 pizzas?
No, not even one [stammers] okay? I’m by myself tonight—
—You should call a d—day. I tell—
—I’ll tell ‘em you were going to call—
—and two small mushroom and we can call it good, okay? [pitch-down delays] cheese—
I’m comin’ down from Arlington. [exhales] [delay] Mushroom [rewind]—
—Oh! maybe not [unintelligible] Rewind! [laughs] What the heck?—
—[delay] and we can call it—I’ll be there in 45 minutes—
—I’m at the airport. Oh, yeah! I’ll be there in 40 minutes!
—Hey! Call us—why don’t you call us [unintelligible]? Huh?—
—[delay] Oh, yeah!, and I need a small onion—
—Alright, thank you very much, sir! Have a nice day, okay?!
Can I get a pizza with half cheese, half pepperoni?
—I can—Ay, mar—Thank you very much. I appreciate it!—
—What’s the matter, guy? I’m tryin’ to place an order here!—
—I’m at the airport, guy. What’s the [rewind]—
—Ah, no—always at the airport! You’re at the airport all the time!—
—Hey, I’m comin’ down right now! I’ll be there in half an hour—
—Alright, I’ll see you in half an hour, alright?—
—and I need a half cheese, half mushroom—
Hi! Could I please pick up a half cheese, [pitch-down] half mushroom pizza?
No, but you can talk to the police station if you call back!—
Thanks for calling Joe & Vinnie's! Can I help you?
Yeah, I’m trying to get that lasagna and, ah, salad, for pickup [sfx]—
—You call back here again—I’ve got your number down—and I will be calling the police right now! I’m calling the police right now!
